Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Continued To Jan-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for and with Chris Stickle (Successor Trustee).

Mr. Bassi stated that he had no contact with the former trustee, that he has not filed the accounting, that he has not responded to the Examiner's notes, that he currently is in Arizona, and that the amended petition was served on him. The Court suggested a body attachment. Mr. Bassi stated that he could have the Court issue a warrant but it won't solve the problem. After conferring with his client Mr. Bassi stated that he wanted to reserve the bench warrant for now and would submit a Substituted Judgment on or before January 13, 2009. The Court continued the matter to January 13, 2009 noting that the matter would be submitted that day. The Court granted Mr. Bassi's request to enter a default.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R.Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Mann.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Nelson Stickle'S Accounting.
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Continued To Jan-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Nelson Stickle'S Accounting.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Continued To Dec-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition: 1. To Supend The Powers Of And Remove Trustee Nelson E. Stickle And Appoint Successor Turstee And Fpr Payment Of Attorney Fees. 20 To Comple Trustee Nelson E. Stickle To Report Information And Account To Beneficiaries. 30 To Comple Trustee Nelson E. Stickles To Redress Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Chris Stickle. Nelson Stickle in propria persona.

Nelson Stickle stated that he could not file the accounting due to the lack of information and that he was not able to determine the balance in the trust. Mr. Bassi stated that Nelson Stickle had not filed tax returns for the trust and that he had ignored his duties as trustee. After hearing Mr. Stickle's opposition, the Court granted the petition removing Nelson Stickle as Trustee and appointing Sue A. Kokos as Successor Trustee. The Court directed Nelson Stickle to deliver all records within ten days, to deliver all assets within thirty days to Ms. Kokos, and to provide an accounting from May 16, 2006 to the present date which is to be done within thirty days. The Court continued the Request for Surcharge, Legal Fees, and Costs to December 3, 2008 for the petitioner to provide proper support. Status on Nelson Stickle's Accounting is set for November 19, 2008. The Court encouraged Nelson Stickle to seek assistance with the accounting. Mr. Bassi to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: J. Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Wong.

Petition For Declaratory Relief To Determine Whether Proposed Petition Is A Contest Within Terms Of No Contest Clause
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Shearer for and with Chris Stickle. Nelson Stickle (Trustee) in Pro Per.

Mr. Shearer stated that they were not trying to challenge the trust, that they were trying to enforce it and trying to get the trust distributed. Nelson Stickle stated that the issue regarding transfer of title of the San Rafael property needed to be settled before distribution could be done. The Court informed Nelson Stickle that the issue with the property was not before the Court today and ruled that the petition was not in violation of the no contest clause, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
